Audit.title: Audit log
Audit.subtitle: Every BRAIN-applied action, newest first. Undo works for the last {undoLimit} actions within {undoWindow}.

Brain.title: Digital Twin / 3D Model
Brain.dropMriHint: Drop an MRI file (.nii or .nii.gz) here to render Aleksandra's brain in three dimensions. Mount point is wired; the viewer is under construction.

Dashboard.accessPostureBody: Server-rendered data only. Service credentials remain on the server, and MRI data is never fetched here.
Dashboard.configWarning: Supabase environment is not configured for the viewer runtime. The page shell is ready; live counts appear after `SUPABASE_URL` and `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` are set on the server.
Dashboard.rlsSmoke: RLS smoke: covered by Phase 2.5 verifier C.2.
Dashboard.subtitle: A compact family view of ingestion, memory growth, alerts, and validation status. Clinical decisions stay with Aleksandra's doctors; this view tracks research workflow state.
Dashboard.title: Family-visible operations dashboard

Home.dashboardCardSubtitle: Counts, latest workflow events, spend traces, and top-ranked papers in one view.
Home.hypothesesCardSubtitle: Confirm evidence-linked research hypotheses, hold uncertain items, or reject weak ones.
Home.privacyFooter: Privacy: MRI data is client-side only. Never persisted on a server.
Home.subtitle: Continuous research ingestion, memory, and hypothesis validation for Aleksandra Jincharadze. This surface is for family workflow visibility; clinical action stays with physicians.
Home.title: ALEKSANDRA_BRAIN

Hypotheses.curatorActionBody: Confirmation marks the evidence link curated for research follow-up. It is not a clinical treatment recommendation.
Hypotheses.configWarning: Hypotheses are ready to display after Supabase is configured on the server.
Hypotheses.curatorNotePlaceholder: Optional curator note (why? evidence quality? next step?)
Hypotheses.detailReasoningPlaceholder: Why this verdict? Which paper carries the weight? What is the next step?
Hypotheses.emptySupportingPapers: No supporting papers linked yet. The pipeline cites these in ai_reasoning; `backfill_supporting_papers.py` populates the UUID array.
Hypotheses.subtitle: Research hypotheses can be confirmed for follow-up, held under review, or rejected. Confirmation here means evidence links were curated; it does not mean treatment approval.
Hypotheses.title: Validation workflow

Knowledge.fallback: Until then, use the dashboard for live counts and top papers.
Knowledge.subtitle: Papers, graph, hypotheses, perception pipeline — coming soon.
Knowledge.title: Knowledge

Manager.title: BRAIN
Manager.noActivity: No recent activity. Drop a file or speak a note to start.

email.openGmailNote: Open Gmail → Drafts to review and send. Never auto-sent.

Papers.subtitle: Read-only view of ingested literature and trial records ranked by relevance to Aleksandra's research context.
Papers.title: Papers

Therapies.subtitle: Read-only status view of treatments, programs, and research candidates. This page is operational context, not clinical advice.
Therapies.title: Therapies

Timeline.subtitle: Read-only chronological record of key events used for family workflow visibility and research context.
Timeline.title: Timeline
